original:
"Servant of Moloch! Redemption is not- is not..."

The Pather's eyes go wide at a red flash from a secondary display.

"By Ludd's hells, it is..." $HeOrShe returns to stare, horrified, through the comm-link. $HisOrHer face is full of terror... and hatred.
OR
"Submit and repent! Your use of sinful technologies may- may..."

The Pather's eyes go wide at a red flash from a secondary display.

"By the blessed stars is that..." $HisOrHer eyes return to the comm-link, fixed with horror... and hatred.

"May the Path be r-" The $post's eyes go suddenly wide at a red flash from a secondary display.

"Blessed Ludd!" $heOrShe gasps.

"An abomination, a devil-$shipOrFleet from Hell itself is before us! We pray to Providence to pass this test which has been given unto our unworthy-"

The $post's words are for $hisOrHer crew, not you, and the link shudders into static. The last image you see are hands clasped in prayer.

"An abomination, a devil-$shipOrFleet from Hell itself is before us! We pray to Providence to pass this test which has been given unto our unworthy-"

The $post's words are for $hisOrHer crew, not you, and the link shudders into static. The last image you see are hands clasped in prayer.

"An abomination, a devil-$shipOrFleet from Hell itself is before us! We pray to Providence to pass this test which has been given unto our unworthy-"

The $post's words are for $hisOrHer crew, not you, and the link shudders into static. The last image you see are hands clasped in prayer.

"May the Path be r-" The $post's eyes go suddenly wide at a red flash from a secondary display.

They return to the comm-link, fixed with fear... and hatred.
